mapper.select: SELECT DD.CODE as RECV_TEL_NUM ,DD.CODE_DESC as RECV_USER_NM FROM STOCCODD DD WHERE DD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DD.CODE_TYPE = 'M170' AND LANG_CD = #{ses.langCd} AND USE_FLAG = '1' AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO STOCBLOG (
JOB_SQ ,
JOB_DATE ,JOB_TYPE ,JOB_ID ,JOB_KEY ,JOB_RLT ,JOB_RLT_CD ,JOB_RLT_MSG ,JOB_END_DATE ) VALUES (
SEQ_STOCBLOG.NEXTVAL ,(#{JOB_DATE}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')
(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')
,#{JOB_TYPE} ,#{JOB_ID} ,#{JOB_KEY} ,#{JOB_RLT} ,#{JOB_RLT_CD} ,#{JOB_RLT_MSG}
,(#{JOB_END_DATE}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')
,(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')
)
